description: eDreams is an online travel booking service for flights and related travel products. Its site also presents Mozio-branded ground transportation offerings and partner integrations for airport transfers.
summary: eDreams exposes a public MCP server at https://www.edreams.com/ai-travel-assistant/chatgpt/v1/mcp; no public developer-facing REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface on edreams.com could be verified from public documentation.
